ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the applicant */,
  "intended_program" TEXT /* Intended program of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gre_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GRE score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "verbal_reasoning_score" INTEGER /* Verbal reasoning score achieved by the applicant */,
  "quantitative_reasoning_score" INTEGER /* Quantitative reasoning score achieved by the applicant */,
  "analytical_writing_score" INTEGER /* Analytical writing score achieved by the applicant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the GRE test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gre_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toefl_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TOEFL score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "listening_score" INTEGER /* Listening score achieved by the applicant */,
  "reading_score" INTEGER /* Reading score achieved by the applicant */,
  "speaking_score" INTEGER /* Speaking score achieved by the applicant */,
  "writing_score" INTEGER /* Writing score achieved by the applicant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the TOEFL test was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toefl_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value assigned to the university */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements_of_purpose" (
  "sop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SOP */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the SOP */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the SOP */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date when the SOP was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_of_purpose_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "letters_of_recommendation" (
  "lor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LOR */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the LOR */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the LOR */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date when the LOR was submitted */,
  "recommender_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommender */,
  "recommender_title" TEXT /* Title of the recommender */,
  "recommender_organization" TEXT /* Organization of the recommender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_letters_of_recommendation_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cgpa_records" (
  "cgpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CGPA record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* CGPA achieved by the applicant */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute where the applicant studied */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the applicant */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date when the applicant graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cgpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cgpa_records_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_experiences" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research experience record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "has_research" INTEGER /* Indicates if the applicant has research experience */,
  "research_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the research */,
  "research_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the research */,
  "research_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the research was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_experiences_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date when the interview is scheduled */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time when the interview is scheduled */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_title" TEXT /* Title of the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date when the communication was made */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Method of communication */,
  "communication_content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the admissions system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
